name_cn:
🎉Vintage Zipper Style🎉1BG468🎉🎉
This Vintage chain quilted crossbody bag design is amazing 👏👏
Purely handmade nylon quilted design, can be worn as shoulder, crossbody, or crossbody style. Imported black gold chain pairing is truly a Vintage classic 😘😘
Simple and elegant, very large capacity 👍 extremely trendy, versatile and stylish. Whether casual or formal, it exudes a steady, classy vibe. Grab yours now 🙊 I love this Vintage crossbody bag 😘😘
25x24x5cm
